## AI Assist Disclosure

<!-- Required: Did you use an AI coding assistant to write or review this PR? If so, which one and in what mode? -->

- **AI model used**: <!-- e.g., Claude 4 Sonnet, Gemini 2.5 Pro, GPT-4o, etc. — or "none" -->
- **Agentic flow**:
  - [ ] None — I wrote this myself without AI assistance
  - [ ] Advice-only — AI answered questions or reviewed my code, I wrote all changes
  - [ ] HITL (Human-in-the-Loop) — I directed an AI agent step-by-step, reviewing each change
  - [ ] AFK (Away-From-Keyboard) — I gave a high-level prompt and an AI agent implemented autonomously
